skills.name: brainstorming
skills.one_liner: Turn an idea into a clear plan before building.
skills.when_to_use: Starting any new feature or open-ended task.

skills.name: code-review
skills.one_liner: Review your changes for bugs and cleanups.

skills.name: verify
skills.one_liner: Run the app and confirm a change actually works.

skills.name: writing-plans
skills.one_liner: Break a task into bite-sized, testable steps.
skills.when_to_use: When a task has more than a couple of moving parts.
